name: Carmel Apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 large green apples (cut into bite size pieces)
3 large red apples (cut into bite size pieces)
6 cups Cool Whip (Lite or Fat Free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chopped apples and Snicker bar bits together.
2. Stir in the Cool Whip until combined.
3. Chill the mixture until ready to serve.
